ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Full name of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" REAL /* Height of the player in cm */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the player in kg */,
  "foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (e.g., left, right) */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "contract_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the player's contract with the club expires */,
  "market_value" REAL /* Current market value of the player */,
  "injury_status" TEXT /* Current injury status of the player (e.g., healthy, injured) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "clubs" (
  "club_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each club */,
  "club_name" TEXT /* Name of the club */,
  "club_location" TEXT /* Location of the club */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the stadium where the club plays its home matches */,
  "manager" TEXT /* Name of the current manager */,
  "founded" INTEGER /* Year the club was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the club */,
  "social_media" TEXT /* Social media handles (e.g., Twitter, Facebook) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_club" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "club_id" INTEGER /* ID of the club */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the player played for the club */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the player joined the club */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* Date when the player left the club */,
  "transfer_fee" REAL /* Amount paid for the transfer of the player */,
  "loan_status" TEXT /* Whether the player is on loan (e.g., yes, no) */,
  "loan_club" TEXT /* If on loan, the club from which the player is loaned */,
  "loan_expiry_date" TEXT /* Date when the loan period ends */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "club_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the position */,
  "abbr" TEXT /* Abbreviation for the position (e.g., GK, DF, MF) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_position" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* ID of the position */,
  "primary_position" TEXT /* Whether this is the player's primary position (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season during which the match was played */,
  "match_date" TEXT /* Date when the match was played */,
  "opponent" TEXT /* Name of the opponent */,
  "result" TEXT /* Result of the match */,
  "home_team" TEXT /* Name of the home team */,
  "away_team" TEXT /* Name of the away team */,
  "home_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_team_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "venue" TEXT /* Venue where the match was played */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_matches" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Minutes played by the player */,
  "score" REAL /* Score of the player */,
  "goals_scored" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player in the match */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player in the match */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player in the match */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player in the match */,
  "substitution_time" TEXT /* Time of substitution (if substituted) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_stats" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "season" TEXT /* Season for which the statistics are calculated */,
  "matches_played" INTEGER /* Number of matches played */,
  "average_score" REAL /* Average score of the player */,
  "average_total_score" REAL /* Average total score of the player */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists */,
  "penalty_goals" INTEGER /* Number of penalty goals */,
  "penalty_misses" INTEGER /* Number of penalty misses */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of yellow cards received */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Total number of red cards received */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Total minutes played in the season */,
  "substitutions_in" INTEGER /* Number of times substituted in */,
  "substitutions_out" INTEGER /* Number of times substituted out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id", "season")
)

CREATE TABLE "injuries" (
  "injury_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each injury */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player */,
  "injury_date" TEXT /* Date when the injury occurred */,
  "injury_type" TEXT /* Type of injury */,
  "expected_return_date" TEXT /* Expected date of return to play */,
  "severity" TEXT /* Severity of the injury (e.g., minor, major) */,
  "injury_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the injury */,
  "treatment" TEXT /* Treatment details (e.g., surgery, rest) */,
  "recovery_time" INTEGER /* Estimated recovery time in days */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("injury_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_injuries_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., coach, trainer, administrator) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* User's phone number */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the last login */,
  "active_status" TEXT /* Whether the user account is active (e.g., yes, no) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the access occurred */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, edit) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access occurred */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device used for access (e.g., desktop, mobile) */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the browser */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the report */,
  "report_name" TEXT /* Name of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., player performance, team statistics) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the report */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* Path to the generated report file */,
  "keywords" TEXT /* Keywords for searching the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dashboards" (
  "dashboard_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each dashboard */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_name" TEXT /* Name of the dashboard */,
  "dashboard_type" TEXT /* Type of the dashboard (e.g., player performance, team statistics) */,
  "dashboard_date" TEXT /* Date when the dashboard was generated */,
  "dashboard_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the dashboard */,
  "widgets" TEXT /* List of widgets used in the dashboard */,
  "layout" TEXT /* Layout configuration of the dashboard */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("dashboard_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_dashboards_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
